posts.title: Hello World
posts.text: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment

posts.title: how to build Hexo static website
posts.text:
Build Hexo with github.ioPre-requirement install git, nodejs ((https://github.com/nodejs/node-gyp#on-windows). npm config (avoid using C:) npm config set prefix "\path
odejs
ode_global" npm config set cache "\path
odejs
ode_cache" notice: require admin account to “npm install” with config on Windows - check! Installrefer to [2, 3] - check! issue one: Github host key verification failed. solution: input “yes” other than [enter]. Reference[1] Hexo https://hexo.io/zh-cn/docs/writing [2] install https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/60578464 [3] install https://blog.csdn.net/weixin_42365530/article/details/107750003 [4] theme of icarus https://github.com/ppoffice/hexo-theme-icarus [5] related http://doraemonzzz.com/page/3/
